title: Assertion failure when using functions having constant inputs

features.name: function with constant concatenation as input argument
features.description: Code should include a function call where the input argument is a concatenation of constant values used in a procedural continuous assignment

features.name: function with for loop using integer counter
features.description: Code should include a function definition containing a for loop that uses an integer variable as the loop counter

features.name: bit-select with arithmetic expression index
features.description: Code should include a bit-select operation where the index is an arithmetic expression involving a subtraction and loop variable

features.name: bit-select slice assignment on function return value
features.description: Code should include a function return value being sliced and assigned within the function body

features.name: nested concatenation as function argument
features.description: Code should include a multi-level concatenation expression used as an argument to a function call
